productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Revo Navy White Jacket
description: CompositionClimaProof mesh lined woven jacket made of 100% polyester micro dobby weave, with front pockets secured engineered with invisible zippers, self fabric collar, brushed tricot inner, elastic binding at waist and cuffs, attached cap of same material with inner mesh and adidas 3-Stripes on sleevesFittingRegularWash careHand wash or machine washKeep the wind and chill away in this adidas Revolutionary Jacket. Engineered with ClimaProof technology, this jacket wind, rain and even snow keeping you warm and comfortable. At the same time, it ensures that excess body heat and sweat evaporates easily, providing you with a dry, fresh and comfortable Fit even in harsh weather conditions. The elastic binding at the waist and cuffs ensure a snug, comfort fit, while the mesh-lined cap keeps your head dry and well protected in wet weather. An absolute comfort when riding in bad weather, it also makes for an essential addition to your running gear. The patented 3-Stripes from Adidas along the sleeves and the logo on the left chest add to your style statement, making it a perfect wear for the fashion forward.Model's statistics1. The model wears trousers, length of 41" 2. Height-6", Waist-32"
